title: solanum indicum var. kandtii
intro: Solanum indicum var. kandtii is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family, commonly known as the nightshade family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and roots of Solanum indicum var. kandtii have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, providing several health benefits. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or by drying and powdering them for use in teas, capsules, or topical applications.
